title: Add equivalent UDP malformed cases (checksum, short packet)
description: Create UDP test vectors mirroring ICMPv6 errors: bad UDP checksum, truncated UDP, invalid ports if applicable. Use hex bytes, expect_error values, category malformed. Ensure cross-layer consistency.
close_reason: Added bad_udp_checksum and short_udp_packet vectors to rpl_messages.json mirroring the ICMPv6 ones; updated descriptions and schema.json; schema validation passes; committed and pushed (after resolving rebase)
